key.name: enabled
key.description: Whether the extension should generate and apply spanned per-monitor wallpapers.

key.name: default-directory
key.description: Fallback directory used for monitors without an explicit directory mapping.

key.name: monitor-directories
key.description: Map of monitor connector names or numeric monitor indexes to wallpaper directories.

key.name: recursive
key.description: Whether wallpaper directories should include image files from child directories.

key.name: image-extensions
key.description: File extensions considered valid wallpaper images.

key.name: refresh-minutes
key.description: Minutes between automatic wallpaper refreshes. Zero disables timed refresh.

key.name: shuffle-token
key.description: Incremented by the preferences UI to request an immediate wallpaper refresh.

key.name: cache-directory
key.description: Directory for generated spanned wallpaper files. Empty uses the user cache directory.

key.name: wallhaven-enabled
key.description: Whether Wallhaven should periodically download wallpapers into the configured Wallhaven directory.

key.name: wallhaven-directory
key.description: Fallback directory where downloaded Wallhaven images are stored for monitors without a dedicated Wallhaven directory.

key.name: wallhaven-directories
key.description: Map of monitor connector names or numeric monitor indexes to Wallhaven download directories.

key.name: wallhaven-query
key.description: Fallback search query sent to the Wallhaven API for monitors without a dedicated query.

key.name: wallhaven-queries
key.description: Map of monitor connector names or numeric monitor indexes to Wallhaven search queries.

key.name: wallhaven-categories
key.description: Wallhaven category bit field, such as 111 for general, anime, and people.

key.name: wallhaven-purity
key.description: Wallhaven purity bit field. Use conservative values unless an API key is configured.

key.name: wallhaven-sorting
key.description: Wallhaven sorting mode, such as random, relevance, date_added, views, favorites, or toplist.

key.name: wallhaven-atleast
key.description: Fallback minimum image resolution requested from Wallhaven for monitors without a dedicated minimum resolution.

key.name: wallhaven-atleasts
key.description: Map of monitor connector names or numeric monitor indexes to Wallhaven minimum resolutions.

key.name: wallhaven-api-key
key.description: Optional Wallhaven API key. Leave empty for public searches.

key.name: wallhaven-refresh-minutes
key.description: Minutes between Wallhaven download attempts. Zero disables timed downloads.

key.name: wallhaven-fetch-token
key.description: Incremented by the preferences UI to request an immediate Wallhaven download.
